name: sou-ai-helpdesk-pro
description: SOU AI HelpDesk Pro - Enterprise AI-Powered University ERP, Multi-Agent Help Desk & Management System for Silver Oak University

scripts.dev: concurrently -n backend,frontend -c blue,magenta "npm --workspace backend run dev" "npm --workspace frontend run dev"
scripts.build: npm --workspace backend run build && npm --workspace frontend run build
